sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84403" key="polemai/netos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολεμ-αίνετος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84403.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">famed in war, Lyr.Oxy.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">426.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
